# SocTrace - Roadmap

### Sprint 1
- PostgreSQL/PostGIS operational
- ETL demographic pipeline
- electoral integration
- first marts built
- first MVP in Streamlit

### Sprint 2
- brand exploration
- UI experimentation
- migration decision to frontend-driven web
